title: Ender's Muskets
body:
Small mad that adds muskets.
New Weapos reload like crossbow and have custom reloading sounds

New Weapons:

--- Musket ---
- deals 24 damage
- reloading time: 70 ticks (3.5 seconds)
- Has 768 uses
- Uses cartriges as ammo

--- flintlock ---
- deals 15 damage
- reloading time: 40 ticks (2 seconds)
- Has 512 uses
- Uses Metal Balls as ammo

---Bulderbuss---
- it's a shotgun
- 5 shots
- deals 9, 12, 15, 12, 9 dmamage
- reloading time: 110 ticks (5.5 seconds)
- Has 384 uses
- Uses Metal balls and cartrige as ammo

---HandCannon---
- deals 37.5 damage
- reloading time: 60 ticks (3 seconds)
- Has 128 uses
- Uses gunpowder and cobblestone as ammo

---Hunting Rifle---
- deals 18 damage
- reloading time: 45 ticks (2.25 seconds)
- Has 640 uses
- Uses cartriges as ammo

---Repeater---
- Semi automatic musket
- has magazine (5 rounds)
- deals 10 damage
- reloading time 20 ticks per bullet (1 second)
- Has 2 056 uses
- Uses metal balls as ammo

---Duble Barrel Shotgun---
- it's a shotgun
- Has a magazine (2 rounds)
- 3 shots
- deals 9, 15, 9 damage
- reloading time 100 ticks per barrel (5 seconds)
- Has 1024 uses
- Uses Cartriges as ammo

---Heavy Musket---
- deals 30 damage
- reloading time: 120 ticks (6 seconds)
- has 1408 uses
- uses cartriges as ammo

-Guns with Magazines Instruction-
- Sneek + Right click to load 1 bullet
- right click to shoot

Recomended to play with JEI for recipes -
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei
- https://modrinth.com/mod/jei

Made using Mcreator


Plans:
- Advancements
- More guns
- Balancing
- making repeater optainable
- gun system as a new gun element
